page.title: Global Glyphs
page.description: Manage global glyph definitions used in fable configuration interpolation.

empty.title: No global glyphs
empty.description: Create a global glyph to use ${glyph} interpolation across all fable configurations.

form.title: Create Global Glyph
form.publicHelp: Public glyphs are visible to all users (admin only)

panel.title: Available Glyphs
panel.help:
Use ${name} syntax in block configuration values to reference dynamic glyphs.

Intrinsic — system-provided, always available (e.g., runId, submitDatetime). startDatetime and attemptCount update on each retry.

Global — user-defined key-value pairs shared across fables. Manage them via the admin page.

Context — injected automatically per-execution (e.g., by the scheduler). Not shown here.

Precedence: Intrinsic → Global → Context.
Pinned glyphs (startDatetime, attemptCount) always use the intrinsic value.
